title: Ruined Lighthouse
description: Adds a broken lighthouse to the beach with hidden loot and a challenging parkour inside, rewarding players who reach the top
body:
**This mod adds a broken, overgrown lighthouse with hidden loot and a challenging parkour inside, rewarding players who reach the top.**

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc2b3e46207bc49283726a146911ce382b03154f.jpeg)


Structure:

The lighthouse generates only in beach biomes.
Inside, you'll find a destroyed interior with scattered remnants of loot hidden throughout the structure.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9f4fdf0a73657059d6c2380883caef451e67143.jpeg)


Jump ’n’ Run:

Since the stairs are broken, you'll need to complete a challenging jump ’n’ Run parkour to reach the top.
If you make it to the top, you'll be rewarded with some valuable loot.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ce1bf42c2d8226e44a11f76e49ec97d99076130.jpeg)


Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks

Made by SuperWarioModTeam and MadeBySanny
